long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between ir01b.sr07.wdc04 Et50/1 <-> fcr05b.wdc04 Et1/10 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19711
short_description: ir01b.sr07.wdc04 Et50/1 <-> fcr05b.wdc04 Et1/10 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
